question: Which country has produced both players with earnings over 1400000 and players with earnings below 1100000?
sql: SELECT Country FROM player WHERE Earnings > 1400000 GROUP BY Country HAVING COUNT(*) > 0 INTERSECT SELECT Country FROM player WHERE Earnings < 1100000 GROUP BY Country HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;

back_translation.intent: 查找同时满足两个条件的国家

semantic.reason: 过滤条件存在逻辑矛盾（Earnings >1400000 与 Earnings <1100000 无法同时成立），实际应通过 GROUP BY 和 HAVING 检查国家是否同时包含满足两个条件的球员
